title: ✔ Students must complete:
content:
✔ Students must complete:
• One Concrete challenge (fact-based analysis, historical context).
• One Abstract challenge (thematic interpretation, deeper conceptual engagement).
• One Connecting challenge (relating the material to other media, history, or modern-day issues).
• One Exploratory challenge (hypothetical, creative application, future projection).
• Close Reading Section (annotation + in-depth literary response).
• Creative Section (a written adaptation, re-interpretation, or stylistic imitation).

✔ Each level of difficulty has a thematic framing.
✔ Pass = Move forward with the streak.
✔ Fail = Lose the streak, attempt a Redemption Path, or be permanently removed from the Mastery path.

Multi-Layered Thematic Worlds for Mastery Exams
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 98 (chunk 98/555)
